import type TokenProcessor from "../TokenProcessor"; /** * Determine whether this optional chain or nullish coalescing operation has any await statements in * it. If so, we'll need to transpile to an async operation. * * We compute this by walking the length of the operation and returning true if we see an await * keyword used as a real await (rather than an object key or property access). Nested optional * chain/nullish operations need to be tracked but don't silence await, but a nested async function * (or any other nested scope) will make the await not count. */ export default function isAsyncOperation(tokens: TokenProcessor): boolean;
